name: AVITA Medical, Inc.
summary: OVERVIEW AVITA Medical is a leading therapeutic acute wound care company delivering transformative solutions designed to optimize wound healing, accelerate patient recovery, and improve clinical and economic outcomes across the continuum of acute wound management.
